content: I don't remember the context of any particular rendering and there were several in queue when I exited the framework for the night. But I do remember now that I said that the sky was crying just before leaving, so I guess if you searched for any by yourself rendered illustration prior to that point that might do the trick. Of course I can do the scrolling if I have to...but that rings another bell! You were going to render some scrolls related to this or that..
